summary: Iteration 44 testing - New features verification for ASR solar business website. Tested QR payment modal, CRM Credentials tab, Staff Portal mobile features, and backend endpoints.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints are working correctly. Staff portal login works after activating staff account and disabling OTP via API.

features_verified.book_solar_service_button: PASS - Homepage shows 'Book Solar Service - ₹2499' button with data-testid='book-now-btn'
features_verified.qr_payment_modal: PASS - Clicking button opens modal with 'Book Solar Service' title, 'Service Amount ₹2,499', and form fields
features_verified.crm_credentials_tab: PASS - CRM shows Credentials tab with 'Create Staff' button and staff list after refresh
features_verified.otp_toggle_buttons: PASS - Enable/Disable OTP buttons visible for each staff (22 Enable, 1 Disable found)
features_verified.staff_portal_sticky_nav: PASS - Code verified: sticky top-0 z-40 class applied to navigation
features_verified.staff_leads_mobile_card_view: PASS - Code verified: md:hidden card view with data-testid='lead-card-{id}'
features_verified.staff_leads_status_dropdown: PASS - Code verified: quickUpdateLeadStatus function with data-testid='mobile-lead-status-{id}'
features_verified.staff_leads_call_button: PASS - Code verified: tel: link with Phone icon in both desktop and mobile views
features_verified.staff_leads_whatsapp_button: PASS - Code verified: sendWhatsApp function with MessageSquare icon

frontend_visual_tests.qr_modal: PASS - Shows Service Amount ₹2,499, Full Name/Phone/Email fields
frontend_visual_tests.crm_credentials_tab: PASS - Shows Admin Credentials, Staff Credentials with Create Staff button, OTP toggle buttons
